prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-SPOONSET-4PC-BEIGE Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 4pc Cream Wheat Straw Cooking Spoons Kitchen Utensils Set Household Essentials Description: Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille 4pc cooking spoons set made with wheat straw. These cooking spoons are made with an innovative plant based material called wheat straw, that mimics classic kitchen tools without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic.

Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable and a great zero waste option. It’s certified BPA free and is food grade safe so you can count on it for food and meal prep. The spoons and spatulas are dishwasher safe for easy clean up after use.

Search Terms: kitchen utensils set; cooking baking supplies; cooking spoons; soup ladle; skimmer spoon; serveware; restaurant equipment; sustainable products; wheat straw; kitchen gadgets tools; culinary gifts; chef; house warming gifts new home Features: - KITCHEN UTENSILS SET: Beille cooking spoons set is a must have in the kitchen for cooking, baking, food and meal prep; set includes one slotted spoon, one solid spoon, one soup ladle and one skimmer spoon - PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Unique kitchen utensils set are made of bioplastic wheat straw; a plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable; Innovative material is a great zero waste option; Certified BPA free - SOLID AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw spoons mimic traditional plastic cooking spoons and spatulas without harmful byproducts; spoons and spatulas are dishwasher safe - STAINLESS STEEL HANDLES: Sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy cream color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13.0 x 2..5 inches; Material: 60% wheat straw, 40% polypropylene === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4pc Cream Wheat Straw Cooking Spoons Set

openai.item_name: Beille 4-pc Cream Wheat Straw Cooking Spoons Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Plant-Based Wheat Straw, Stainless Steel Handles, Dishwasher Safe, BPA-Free, Sustainable Kitchen Utensils

openai.title_differentiation: Slotted Spoon - Solid Spoon - Soup Ladle - Skimmer Spoon - BPA-Free - Dishwasher Safe - Stainless Steel Handles
